title: A Practical Scorecard for Measuring AI Impact
hook: Most teams talk about AI ROI but rarely have a concrete way to measure it.
partner_takeaway: Readers learn a practical framework to measure AI impact through ROI, cost per successful task, dependability, and compute efficiency.
reasoning: AI adoption is accelerating, but teams struggle to quantify its real value. Sharing a tactical scorecard gives readers immediate tools to justify AI investments and optimize workflows, fitting the practical AI track.

title: How I Ship AI Features: Lessons from First Production Launch
hook: Shipping my first AI-powered feature to production taught me more about workflow design than any tutorial.
partner_takeaway: Readers learn the key steps and pitfalls in launching an AI feature, including how to test, iterate, and deploy for real users.
reasoning: Personal experience makes tactical advice actionable. By sharing concrete lessons from an actual launch, the writer helps readers avoid common mistakes and accelerate their own AI deployments.

title: Netflix’s Approach: Managing Product Teams in the AI Era
hook: Netflix doesn’t just add AI to its stack—it’s rethinking how product and tech teams operate from the ground up.
partner_takeaway: Readers learn how to adapt product and tech team management to the AI era by adopting systems thinking and building operational excellence.
reasoning: This trend read cuts through hype, showing how a leading company is reshaping organizational structure for AI. The audience gets actionable management insights, not just headlines.

title: Building in Public: The Pattern I Keep Coming Back To
hook: There’s one workflow I rely on every time I need to ship something fast and reliably.
partner_takeaway: Readers learn a repeatable workflow for building and shipping projects efficiently, including common mistakes to avoid.
reasoning: Sharing a proven workflow helps fellow builders and demystifies the process. It fits the building-in-public track, offering practical value and transparency.

title: Is AI a Bubble? What the Data Center Boom Really Means
hook: Everyone’s talking about the AI investment cycle—but few are asking if the infrastructure buildout is sustainable.
partner_takeaway: Readers gain insight into the current AI investment landscape, including debates on whether AI is a bubble and the impact of data center and GPU buildouts.
reasoning: Industry leaders are questioning the sustainability of AI investments. This post gives readers a grounded analysis of market risks, helping them make informed decisions amid hype.
